title: phyllobotrys anglica
intro: Phyllobotrys anglica, also known as the English leaf-flowered orchid, is a rare and endangered species of orchid native to the United Kingdom. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Phyllobotrys anglica include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Phyllobotrys anglica can be found in various forms, including tea, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
